Name: ID
Description: A guid that is the unique identifier of the warehouse

Name: DefaultStorageLocation
Description: The default storage location of this warehouse. Warehouses can have a default storage location in packages Manufacturing Professional & Premium or Wholesale Professional & Premium

Name: Main
Description: Indicates if this is the main warehouse. There's always exactly one main warehouse per administration

Name: UseStorageLocations
Description: Indicates if this warehouse is using storage locations. The storage locations will not be removed when when this is deactivated
